active_planning_focus: Lock v0.3 product packaging planning state.
last_planning_summary: The v0.3 product packaging plan accepts README as a product pamphlet, moves technical depth into docs, keeps the README hero harness-neutral and SVG-first, treats generated social imagery as optional, keeps distribution claims factual until release binaries, curl, or package-manager paths are implemented, supports Codex- and Claude-style model workspace packs as planning UX, and defines no-terminal mode as assisted unless exact CLI proof is supplied. The CLI readiness gate reported READY and relock wrote .ni/plan.lock.json.

recent_decisions.title: v0.3 packaging is README pamphlet, truthful distribution, and model workspace UX

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
